hostname C9800-CL
!
vlan 10
 name USERS
!
wlan Corp-Profile 1 Corp-SSID
 security wpa wpa2
 no shutdown
!
wlan Guest-Profile 2 Guest-SSID
 no security wpa
 no broadcast-ssid
!
wlan Legacy-Profile 3 Legacy-SSID
 security wpa wpa1
 shutdown
!
wlan Secure-Profile 4 Secure-SSID
 security dot1x
 security wpa wpa3
 no shutdown
!
interface Vlan10
 ip address 10.0.10.1 255.255.255.0
!
